records.ety: [L. sacerdotalis, fr. sacerdos, -otis, a priest, fr. sacer holy, sacred: cf. F. sacerdotal.]

defs: Of or pertaining to priests, or to the order of priests; relating to the priesthood; priesty; as, sacerdotal dignity; sacerdotal functions.
quotes: The ascendency of the sacerdotal order was long the ascendency which naturally and properly belongs to intellectual superiority.
